name: Chicken & Dumplins'
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup chicken broth, from stewed chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Stew the chicken and cook the margarine (or butter) until the chicken is tender.
2. Remove the bones from the cooked chicken.
3. Set aside the cooking liquid from the stewed chicken.
4. In a bowl, combine the flour, salt, baking powder, and chicken broth. Mix well to form a smooth dough.
5. Roll out the dough on a lightly floured surface until it is thin and large enough to be cut into strips.
6. Cut the rolled dough into strips, then further cut each strip into smaller squares.
7. Bring the cooking liquid from the stewed chicken back to a boil.
8. Gently drop the dumpling pieces into the boiling liquid in batches.
9. Cover the pot and let the dumplings simmer for 10-20 minutes.
Description:
Southern
